children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type, read from CSV/JSON/API, parse into records, write to raw_data, and append log entry to pipeline_log

global_vars.description: Write parsed records to raw_data store

constraints.description: Must handle source read errors gracefully without crashing

acceptance_criteria.description: All records from source are written to raw_data
Pipeline_log contains an entry for ingestion step

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, skip malformed records, store in processed_data, and log transformation
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule to each record, skip records that cause errors, write valid transformed records to processed_data, append log entry
children.signature: def TransformData(transform_config: dict, raw_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Write transformed records to processed_data store

constraints.description: Malformed records must be skipped and logged, not fail the entire transformation

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid records from raw_data are transformed and written to processed_data
Pipeline_log contains an entry for transformation step

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, compute quality_score, and log validation
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, assign quality_score, mark invalid records (e.g., set a 'valid' flag), append log entry

global_vars.description: Read processed records for validation and write quality flags back

data_operations.description: Read records for validation, update with quality_score and valid flag

constraints.description: All records must receive a quality_score even if invalid

acceptance_criteria.description: All records in processed_data have quality_score and valid flag set
Pipeline_log contains an entry for validation step

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output in requested format, log export, and return final result
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter to only records that passed validation, format as CSV or JSON, append log entry, return pipeline_result with data
children.signature: def ExportData(export_format: str, processed_data: list) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read validated records for export formatting

constraints.description: Only records with valid flag true should be included in output

acceptance_criteria.description: Output contains only valid records in requested format
Pipeline_log contains an entry for export step

governance_notes: Global state conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData(write) + TransformData(read) + ValidateData(no access) + ExportData(no access) — read from TransformData, write from IngestData. processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData(write) + ValidateData(read_write) + ExportData(read) — write from TransformData, read_write from ValidateData, read from ExportData. pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all children (write only) — no child requires read of pipeline_log, but parent only requires write capability for logging, so write coverage from all children satisfies the requirement.
